## Full Description (max 4000 chars)

**Nashik Kumbh Navigator** is your essential, real-time pilgrimage companion for the sacred **Simhastha Kumbh Mela 2027 in Nashik and Trimbakeshwar**. Built for millions of pilgrims, elderly devotees, and families, the app delivers live crowd-aware navigation, Shahi Snan bathing schedules, emergency SOS protection, and offline ghat guides.

### вЬ® KEY FEATURES:

рЯЧЇпЄП **LIVE CROWD-AWARE NAVIGATION & GHAT MAPS**
- Interactive maps of **Ramkund, Kushavarta Ghat, Sadhugram, and Godavari riverfronts**.
- Color-coded crowd density heatmaps (Green/Yellow/Red) showing live pedestrian flow.
- Smart route calculations that guide you away from bottlenecks and overcrowded sector gates.

рЯЪ® **ONE-TAP SOS 108 & EMERGENCY SAFETY**
- Dedicated emergency button connecting directly to Police (100), Medical Ambulance (108), and Disaster Management Helpline (1070).
- Instantly shares your exact GPS coordinates with first responders.
- Community safety alerts for lost & found assistance and sector advisories.

рЯУЕ **SHAHI SNAN BATHING DATES & RITUAL SCHEDULES**
- Detailed countdowns and auspicious muhurat timers for the Three Royal Shahi Snan dates:
  1. **First Shahi Snan**: Shravan Amavasya Royal Bath
  2. **Second Shahi Snan**: BhƒБdrapada Shukla Prathama (Pramukh Snan)
  3. **Third Shahi Snan**: Rishi Panchami / Anant Chaturdashi Closing Bath

рЯМР **MULTILINGUAL & OFFLINE-FIRST**
- Full support for **English, Hindi (а§єа§ња§®а•На§¶а•А), and Marathi (а§Ѓа§∞а§Ња§†а•А)**.
- Offline cached sector maps and emergency contact directories available even when cellular networks are congested.

вЩњ **ACCESSIBILITY & ELDERLY FRIENDLY**
- High-contrast visual mode and large typography for senior pilgrims.
- Audio-assisted guidance for ghat entrances and medical camps.

## Store Content Rating Questionnaire Answers

- **Violence / Mature Content**: None (General Audience, All Ages)
- **User-Generated Content**: Moderated community hazard reports & lost person assistance
- **Personal Information Shared**: GPS Location (encrypted in transit via HTTPS/TLS 1.3)
- **In-App Purchases / Ads**: Zero ads, zero paywalls (Public safety service)
